purpose: A single option inside a SegmentedButton — a toggle button representing one of several mutually-exclusive choices. Shown alongside other SegmentedButtonItems in a horizontal group.
whenToUse: As an option in a SegmentedButton (view toggles, filter modes)
For 2–5 mutually exclusive choices (Day / Week / Month view)
When the options are equally likely — no primary bias
When you want visible toggle state (unlike a Select dropdown)
whenNotToUse: For 6+ options — use Select or ComboBox
For multiple simultaneous selections — use CheckBox group
For a single primary action — use Button
doRules: Show icons when the choices are visual (grid vs list view)
Keep the selected state clearly visible (background + text color)
Maintain consistent width across items in the same group
dontRules: Do not use for more than 5 items — becomes hard to scan
Do not omit selected state — user must know current choice
Do not mix icon-only and label items in the same group
Do not use for permanent state changes without confirmation

layoutGuidance.sizing: Height matches button (32/40px compact/cozy); width hugs content or fixed uniformity
layoutGuidance.spacing: No gap between items; shared border

contentGuidance.contentRules: Noun or short verb (Day, List, All, Details)

responsiveBehavior.M: May shrink; icons may replace text
responsiveBehavior.S: May collapse to a dropdown Select

requirements: role='button' with aria-pressed reflecting selected state
SegmentedButton parent has role='group' with aria-label
Keyboard: Arrow keys move between items; Enter/Space selects
